intent: A first-time visitor heard about undavos.com from a LinkedIn post and wants to figure out what it is, who it's for, and whether it's worth any more of their attention.
notes: v0.3 alpha acceptance test. fresh persona means in-browser state is empty; only the LLM framing differs. If this UNCLEARs, that's the actual UX signal — a fresh visitor couldn't find positioning content within 6 clicks.
